info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: jayaH utkarzaprAptiH  akarmakoyam ' iti sidDAntakOmudI  mA.DA.vfttO api asya DAtoH akarmakatvam eva uktam  ' jayejjayABiBavayorAdyerTesAvakarmakaH  utkarzaprAptiH AdyerTe dvitIyerTe sakarmakaH ' (Slo. 13-14) iti dEvaSlokaH api atra upodbalakaH  kintu kfdantarUpamAlAyAM tu - ' jayaH - utkarza - prAptiH  aBiBavaSca  Adye akarmakaH dvitIye sakarmakaH iti paNktiH dfSyate

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'prAmuM jaya' (aTarva॰6.126.3) prakarzeRa jaya vijayasva saYjayetyarTaH
'te somAhutimajuhavuH tayEnaM prAjayan' (jE0 brA0 113) prAjayan vyajayanta
'ahamindro na parAjigya id Danam' (f॰10.4.85) ahArayamityarTaH parABAvayamiti tu sAyaRaH
'uBA jigyaTurna parAjayeTe' (aTarva॰7.45.1) akarmako'tra parAjayatiH
'parA BAgamozaDInAM jayantAm' (aTarva॰8.3.16) BAgaM parAjayantAm=svaM BAgaM hArayantAm=svasmAdaMSAnnirBajyantAm
'indro jayAti na parAjayAtE' (aTarva॰6.98.1) parAjayaM na laBata ityarTaH aBiBavatIndro nendro'BiBUyata ityAha
'gacCa tvaM kitavaM gatvA saBAyAM pfcCa sUtaja kiM nu pUrvaM parAjEzIrAtmAnamaTavA nu mAm' (BA॰saBA॰67.7).. parAjiratra sakarmakaH
'te (devAH) tataH (AgnIDrIyAt) na parAjayanta' (E॰brA॰10.4) parAjayanta=prAcyavanta parAjaya iha pracyutiH
'aDyayanAtparAjayate' (pA॰1.4.26 sUtre vfttO) aDyetuM glAyatItyarTaH
'te devAH saNGAtaM saNGAtaM parAjayanta' (go॰brA॰u॰2.17)
'jizRurhAparAjizRurBavati' (Sa॰brA॰14.5.1.6) ihoBayatra parAjirakarmakaH nyagBavanamAcazwe
'peturArtA vepamAnA gAvo varzaparAjitAH' (hari॰2.19.24) varzaparAjitA vfzwyaBiBUtAH varzaRenodvejitAH
'yena jayAsi na parAjayAsE' (tE0 brA0 2478) na parAjayAsE parAjayaM nApsyasi
'talpasadyaM mA parAjezi' (tE0 brA0 1266) mA parAjezi mA sma hArayam talpasadyaM talpAvasTAnam Danikatvamiti yAvat
'avidyo durbalaH SrImAn hiraRyamamitaM mayA ajeyo baladevo'yamakzadyUte parAjitaH' (hari0 26132).. parAjito hAritaH dvikarmmako jiH apraDAne karmaRi lakAraH
'BrazwABaraRakOSeyAM SokavegaparAjitAm' (rA0 45921) parAjitAmaBiBUtAm
'BartfSokaparAjitA' (rA0 61105) ukto'rTaH
'gAvo varzaparAjitAH' (hari0 21825) varzeRa vfzwyA udvejitA ityAha
'apa ha vE snAtvA BikzAM jayati' (Sa॰brA॰11.3.3.7) apajayati=parAjayate=hArayati
'yena mftyumapajayati' (Sa॰brA॰)
'cOrahftamapajitya yaTAsTAnaM gamayet' (gO॰Da॰2.1.46) jayenABiBavenApahftyetyAha
'AjipaTe vA kuwiM kftvA brAhmaRagavyo'pajigIzamARo vaset' (Apa॰Da॰1.9.24.21) dasyUnapajitya pratyAhartumicCan ityarTaH brAhmaRagavyaH=brAhmaraRagavIH
'vAdino'pajayaheturnigrahasTAnam' (tE॰saM॰dI॰) apajayaH=parAjayaH
'apASanAyAM ca punarmftyuM ca jayanti' (SAM0 brA0 251) apajayanti vijayante prasahante
'etO me punarmftyumapajezyataH' (jE0 brA0 126) ukto'rTaH
'tadahaH punarmftyumapajayati' (bfha0 u0 152) apajayati vArayati
'devA vE yajYa parAjayanta tamAgnIDrAtpunarapAjayan' (tE0 saM0 6311) apAjayan apAdAya svavaSe'kurvan
'na ca sandarSane kiYcitpravfttamapi saYjayet' (BA॰vi॰4.29) saYjayet=svIkuryAt ahampUrvikayA'nAkAritaH sannityarTaH sandarSane samakzam
'sattvaM suKe saYjayati rajaH karmaRi BArata' (gItA 14.9) sattvaM prakfzwaM satsuKaduHKakAraRamaBiBUya saYjayati saMSlezaM janayatItyarTaH
'ito jayeto vijaya saYjaya jaya' (aTarva॰8.8.24)
'sa ca jayati vi ca jayate' (E0 brA0 319) saMyujya (SatrUn) jayati
'yenemA viSvA BuvanAni saMjitA' (tE0 brA0 3117) saMjitAni samyag jitAni
'asminneva vane pArTo hftAM kfzRAmavAjayat' (BA0 vi0 497) avAjayat=yudDenAvajitya pratilabDavAn
'hatasUtAMSca BUyizWAnavajigye narADipAn' (BA0 SAM0 419) avajigye=parAjigye=aBibaBUva
'ahaM vE kuruBiryotsyAmyavajezyAmi te ripUn' (BA0 vi0 456) helayA jezyAmIti nIlakaRWaH idaM ca yuktarUpam avo'vakzepaRaM dyotayati
'gfhasTaScAvajezyAmi mftyum' (BA0 anu0 241) uditapUrva evArTaH
'trivAraM pratirodDA vA sarvasvamavajitya vA' (manu0 1180) avajitya=yudDena pratilaBya
'kadAcidekasImAntagotrajAvajayAya saH' (kaTA0 5320) avajayo jayaH anarTako'vaSabdo yaTA vijaye viH
'SreyAnmftyarna nirjayaH' (BA0 droRa0 20027) nirjayaH parAjayaH
'sa dattvA nirjitAM vfdDiM karaRaM parivartayet' (manu0 8154) nirjitAm=svasvatvenAtmasAtkftAm
'mayA hyalabDanidreRa Dftena tava nirjaye' (rA0 611311) nirjaye jitvA pratilabDO
'prAyastvanmuKasevayA vijayate viSvaM sa puzpAyuDaH' (gIta0) aBiBavatItyarTaH
'rahasyaM sADUnAmanupaDi viSudDaM vijayate' (uttara0 22) sarvotkarzeRa vartata ityarTaH
'yO vE sarvaM jayati vijayate' (jE0 195)
'cakzurmecakamambujaM vijayate' (vA0 BA0 133) vijayate'tiSete atikrAmati
'ito jayeto vijaya saMjaya jaya svAhA' (aTarva0 8824)

'yasmAttameva hotAraM vfRIzvetyetasya lokasya vijitaye' (go0 brA0 pUrva0 224) atra viSabdo vESizwyavacanaH pratiBAti anyatra prAyeRa jayatinA samprayukto nAyaM viSezakft jayo vijaya ityekorTaH locanavilocanavat
'asyADijye Danuzi vijayam' (ASaMsante) (SA0 216) spazwo'rTaH
'praBavati na tadA paro vijetuM Bavati jitendriyatA yadAtmarakzA' (ki0 1035) kzitivijitismftivihitivrataratayaH paramatayaH vijitirvijayo jayaH
'saM ca jayati vi ca jayate' (E0 brA0 319) vijayate viyujya SatrUn jayati
'tAsAM vE hotrARAmAyatInAmAjayantInAmacCAvAkIyA'hIyata' (E0 brA0 236) AjayantInAmaBiBavantInAm
'te vE prAtarAjyerevAjayanta Ayan' (E0 brA0 236) AjayantaH sADu jayantaH vaSe kurvantaH
'lokaM hyatijitaM kftvA hyAvAM hantumihecCati' (rA0 3705) atijitamatiparABUtam
'DAtA zaqakzareRa zaq ftUnudajayat' (tE0 saM0 17111) udajayat=vyajayata
'sa yo na ujjezyati tasya na idaM Bavizyati' (Sa0 brA0 5113) ujjezyati aBivizyati ucCabdo nArTe viSezaM karoti
'AryaM varRamujjApayanti' (paYca0 brA0 5517) vijetAraM kurvantItyAha
'tezAmagnirevodajayat' (jE0 brA0 1108) udajayat uccErajayat utkfzwaM jayamalaBata
'devA vA ozaDIzu pakvAsvAjimayuH sa indro' vedagni rvA ujjezyatIti' (kAWaka0 127) ukto'rTaH
'agnerahamujjitimanUjjezam' (tE0 saM0 1641) ucCrita UrDvalokavizayo vA jaya ujjayaH
'prAmuM jayA'BIme jayantu' (aTarva0 61263) aBijayantu SatrUnaBimuKaM gacCanto jayaM pratipadyantAmityarTaH
'sarvAMllokAnpaSubanDayAjyaBijayati' (Apa0 SrO0 7111) pUrveRa samo'rTaH
'tena parijayyalaByakAryasukaram' (pA0 5193) parijayyaM sarvato jeyam pariH sarvato BAva iti nyAsaH

japApuzacCAyA tava janani jihvA jayati sA
jaya svAmin SaktyA saha Siva gaREH
yadvA jayema yadi vA no jayeyuH
